title: The Leonardo Collection Hand Painted Gin Glass | Dainty Daisies | 1 Piece - 9x9x21 cm
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 Piece Dainty Daisies Hand Painted Gin Glass | 9x9x21 cm
ELEGANT DESIGN: This Gin Glass is adorned with hand-painted White Dainty Daisies that give it a more feminine appearance and makes you appear sexier while sipping your preferred beverage.
ALL-TIME GIFT: This Gin Glass is a great addition to your collection wine glass collection and is a perfect gift for any occasion.
HIGH QUALITY: This Gin glass is made with high-quality material that makes it durable and easy to clean.
COLLECTIBLE: This exquisitely crafted Gin glass is so lovely that you could just collect all the designs and put them on display in your bar.
description: Product Description This Gin Glass is adorned with hand-painted Dainty Daisies that give it a more feminine appearance and make you appear sexier while sipping your preferred beverage. It is so lovely that you could just collect all the designs and put them on display in your bar or as a perfect gift for any occasion for your Family and Friends. It is made with high-quality material that makes it durable and easy to clean. Safety Warning No warning applicable
